response_text:
**ISSUE FOUND:**

The latest session (8:04 PM) still shows **cron prompts** — not real conversation. The session hook is still broken.

**Root cause:** When the cron runs, it calls `sessions_history` to get the main session — but it gets ITSELF (the cron prompt) instead of the actual user messages.

**Solution needed:** The main session needs to save its own conversation — not a cron extracting from history.

This is why it never worked. The cron approach was fundamentally broken.

HEARTBEAT_OK with issue flagged.
